meta.title: kalandra.tech — Pavel Kalandra
meta.description: Personal showcase of Pavel Kalandra — CTO and software engineering leader based in Prague. Built in public with documented architecture decisions.

hero.subtitle: Software engineer and engineering leader based in Prague.

about.title: About Me
description: What drives me as an engineer — and a few things about me beyond the keyboard.
The tech stack I work with, the career path that got me here, and a glimpse of life outside the IDE.

whatsHere.title: What is this page?
whatsHere.paragraph1: is my personal website, but it's also an experiment. I'm building it transparently — every version, every architectural decision, every deployment is public.
